h1.visual_description: Top-right aligned, red, sans-serif text, positioned next to a solid red rectangular block.

h2.visual_description: Bold, all-caps, red serif font used for table titles and major section headings within the body.
h2.example_text: TABLE 28: BREAKDOWN OF IMPRISONMENT CLAUSES IN STATE LAWS

visual_matchers.pattern: Table header with solid red background and white bold text
Alternating light peach and white row backgrounds
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Zebra-striped table rows for data readability

visual_matchers.pattern: Small, italicized black text immediately following a table
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Data source attribution or explanatory footnotes

visual_matchers.pattern: Centered red numeral at the bottom margin

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Source: [Entity Name] or Sources: [Entity Name 1], and [Entity Name 2]

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Section labels and decorative red blocks in the top header area; page numbers in the bottom footer area.
